description.zh: 明朝废除丞相制度，皇权空前强化。内阁负责票拟（起草建议），司礼监负责批红（代行批准），形成文臣与宦官的双轨决策体系。六部直接对皇帝负责，内阁与司礼监相互制约又相互依存，是中国历史上独特的双权力中心制度。
description.en: The Ming Dynasty abolished the chancellorship, concentrating imperial power. The Grand Secretariat drafted proposals (ticket-writing) while the Directorate of Ceremonial approved them (vermillion-marking), creating a dual civil-eunuch decision track. Six Ministries reported directly to the emperor, with Secretariat and Directorate balancing each other—a unique dual-power center in Chinese history.
